creator: cau@cc.gatech.edu
text:
I installed from scratch over the net (using regular FTP).  Installing
the SNAP worked fine.  However, sysinstall is failing when I
try to install packages.  Ie I select bash and tcsh,
it will fetch and install one of them, and "hang" at the screen
where it tells me it successfully installed a package.  I can abort
with control-c, and restart sysinstall.  This all worked fine
in the previous SNAP (960801).

Fix: 

Restart sysinstall for every package.
How-To-Repeat: 
Start /stand/sysinstall, try to install packages.
